Issues: Commercial appeal is low due to the highly stylized and abstract nature, which may limit its broad market appeal unless targeted toward specific art niches.
Print quality and resolution need optimization for commercial use (e.g., higher DPI, specific aspect ratios) to be suitable for high-end sales.
The 'uniqueness' score is moderated; while the style is distinct, it leans into a common illustrative aesthetic rather than groundbreaking originality.
Technical skill in rendering is present, but the execution is simplified, which might make it less attractive to buyers seeking photorealistic or hyper-detailed digital assets.
